idea.title: Forge Heir
idea.hook: You inherit one cursed sword and must un-forge it stroke by stroke — each hammer hit may remove a curse, expose a new one, or break the blade.
idea.prototype: Side view of an anvil + sword diagram (8 segments). Each segment has hidden traits: 1-3 curses (visible as colored runes after first inspection) + a hidden fragility value 1-5. Click a segment to hammer. Hammer has 3 modes (light/medium/heavy) costing 1/2/4 stamina from a 20-stamina pool. Light removes 1 curse if visible. Heavy removes 2 but adds 1 fragility. If fragility reaches 5, segment shatters, lose. Win = remove all curses across all segments. Lose = any segment shatters OR stamina hits 0 with curses remaining.
idea.mutation_of: Autoblade + Gear Factory + Gun Wizard inverted
idea.why_novel: Subtractive forging — risk-managing a single object you must DEGRADE perfectly
idea.lose_condition: Any segment fragility=5 (shatters) OR stamina=0 with curses remaining

sources.title: Forge Heir
sources.snippet: Inverts the build-up loop into a tear-down puzzle

synthesizer_brief: Inversion of additive forging — must degrade an object perfectly without shattering

alternatives.title: Gravity Mailman
alternatives.hook: Throw letters from a planet that shifts
